channel.title: Luka Zoric
channel.description: Notes, essays, and projects by Luka Zoric.

item.title: Note about the posts
item.description: Why I publish: writing is how I measure my own growth, and disagreeing with my past self is the evidence.

item.title: Intent as foundation
item.description: A compact note: if consciousness is fundamental, intent is the foundation of work — build software that turns unique insights into products.

item.title: Building products with LLMs
item.description: Why LLMs are at the limit of their current trajectory, why execution is becoming commoditised, and why your unique insight is the only remaining moat.
